creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Loïc Bartoletti from comment #17)

Thanks for the updated patch and sorry for the delay. Very busy :(


In the qa-stage the ports framework ()DEVELOPER=yes complains about:

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Warning: /usr/ports/graphics/proj/work/pkg-message not in UCL format, will be shown on initial install only.
Warning: See https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/pkg-files.html#porting-message


Otherwise the port builds and installs well :)
